## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 06, KITTI 00, KITTI 05, Zurich Clausiusstrasse — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–8, § IV-A Dataset;IV-B Training and testing;IV-E Loop-closure performance;IV-F Generalization, Fig. 6-7
- **input_unit:** 3D segments extracted from a local point cloud — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4, § III-A. Segmentation, Fig. 2
- **invariances:** none — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;I. Introduction;III. SegMatch
- **representation:** 3D segments, handcrafted eigenvalue features, handcrafted ensemble-of-shape histograms, kNN candidate retrieval, learned random-forest matcher, geometric verification — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–5, § III. SegMatch;III-B Feature extraction;III-C Segment matching;III-D Geometric verification, Fig. 2;Table I
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–5, § III-C Segment matching;IV-B Training and testing setup, Table I
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 4–6, § III. SegMatch;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2
